Auth token switching.question: How should the frontend send the impersonation token to the API?
Auth token switching.answer: Replace Bearer token — store impersonation token in state, use it instead of Firebase token in RTK Query prepareHeaders

Auth token switching.question: Where should impersonation state be stored?
Auth token switching.answer: Redux slice — dedicated impersonationSlice in the Redux store

Auth token switching.question: What happens on page refresh during impersonation?
Auth token switching.answer: End impersonation — Redux state lost on refresh, support user returns to their own dashboard

Banner design & placement.question: Where should the impersonation banner be positioned?
Banner design & placement.answer: Above header — fixed bar at very top of viewport, pushes content down, z-50, Shopify/Stripe pattern

Banner design & placement.question: What visual style should the banner use?
Banner design & placement.answer: Warning amber — amber/yellow background with dark text, conventional impersonation bar pattern

Banner design & placement.question: Should sidebar show customer or support navigation during impersonation?
Banner design & placement.answer: Customer navigation — show business nav items (Jobs, Customers, Quotes) since support user needs to see exactly what customer sees
